description: Characters from ocean and coastal settings.
characters: Reef Guardian
A devoted protector who watches over the coral and its creatures.
Deep-Sea Explorer
A fearless diver who ventures into the lightless depths.
Coral Farmer
A patient cultivator who grows and tends living reef.
Tide Watcher
A keen observer who reads the rhythms of the rising and falling sea.
Shell Collector
A beachcomber who finds beauty in what the waves leave behind.
Current Rider
A daring swimmer who navigates the ocean's flowing highways.
Pearl Diver
A breath-holding treasure seeker who plucks gems from oyster beds.
Kelp Weaver
A crafty undersea artisan who makes useful things from seaweed.
Sand Sculptor
A beach artist who shapes entire worlds from wet sand.
Wave Singer
A melodic soul whose voice carries across the water.
Lighthouse Keeper
A solitary watcher who keeps the guiding light burning through storms.
Shipwright
A skilled builder who shapes timber into seaworthy vessels.
Siren
A haunting sea-singer whose voice draws ships off course.
Sea Witch
A mysterious practitioner of ocean magic and tide spells.
Treasure Hunter
A fortune-seeking diver who searches for sunken riches.
Salvager
A practical scavenger who recovers useful things from wrecks.
Deckhand
A hardworking crew member who keeps the ship running.
Harbormaster
An authority who keeps order where ships meet shore.
Castaway
A stranded survivor making the best of an unplanned island life.
